caption: A man in a dark suit bends forward to sign a document on a table, while another man in a light-colored shirt stands beside him, looking on. A third person, wearing a beige vest, stands partially visible in the background on the left. The setting appears to be an official event with red drapery and yellow flowers on the table. On-screen text at the top reads "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'", and a ticker at the bottom states "जे. पी. नड्डा: नीतीश का वापस आना सुखद समाचार है". A small "MAHARODH" logo and the time "10:01 PM" are visible in the lower right corner. Across the sequence, the man in the suit continues to sign the document, slightly shifting his posture, while the man in the light shirt remains stationary, observing the action. The camera angle and the people's positions remain consistent throughout the frames.
